name: Clinuvel Pharmaceuticals Limited
analysis: CUV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$9.6600. Trade idea: entry A$9.9500, stop A$8.2665, target A$11.9000 (1.16:1) — then trail it.
